name: Jocelyn
subject: Make sure your vote counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Fair elections are critical to a healthy democracy. But for elections to be fair, every vote must count equally. |
---

| | Peter,

Fair elections are critical to a healthy democracy. But for elections to be fair, every vote must count equally.

Peter, we want election results to accurately reflect voters' choices. That's why we're fighting for fair districts that truly reflect the will of voters. **[Will you stand with us and sign Joe's petition to end gerrymandering?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2293/7377f838/3009c847/51fadc50/817406108/VEsH/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/make-sure-your-vote-counts")**

Using partisan gerrymandering, Indiana politicians have manipulated our voting districts to give Republicans an unfair electoral advantage. For example: In the 2016 congressional elections, almost 40% of the votes cast were for Democrats -- but Democrats won only two of Indiana's nine U.S. House seats (22%).

Hoosiers are frustrated that their voices aren't being heard. And when people feel their vote means less, they stop showing up. We cannot allow gerrymandering to continue silencing our voices.

**Joe wants to make Indiana voting districts fair, but he needs your help.[Will you sign Joe's petition to fight for fair districts?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2293/7377f838/3009c847/51fadc50/817406108/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/make-sure-your-vote-counts")**

We need every vote to count, and it starts with you.

Thanks,
Jocelyn | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2293/7377f838/3009c847/51fadc53/817406108/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20180220.3db&amount=25")**
---

|

name: Scott Arceneaux, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: NEW POLL: two things we just learned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1b/446091091/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonOpen_fnd_gq_act__SA&source=em18_180220_PollNonOpen_fnd_gq_act__SA")
Hello,

**1\. The primary is basically tied.**

**2\. Gillum outperforms Graham in a hypothetical general election vs. Putnam.**

Gravis just put out a new poll of the gubernatorial primary and general election.

Andrew Gillum, the most progressive candidate in our state's history, is outperforming Democrat Gwen Graham in a general election matchup with the leading GOP candidate who describes himself as an "NRA Sellout," Adam Putnam. This is huge news.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1a/446091091/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=2")
It's huge because it confirms what we already know -- as Democrats, we have to nominate a progressive who is exciting, authentic, and will get out the vote in a general election.

Let's also make something very clear: We've been outspent by every other campaign -- by a lot. Yet we are polling basically margin of error tied with our primary opponents, including one who has already spent $4 million on TV. By comparison, we've spent $0 on TV.

That will change. And when it does, we expect to pull ahead.

**[Every $1 you invest in this campaign goes further and does more to fund a Democratic win in November than any other campaign. And you can also rest easy knowing it's going to fund a true progressive message.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1d/446091091/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=3+-+Every+1+you+invest+in+this+campaign+goes")**

Andrew Gillum is one of us.

1\. He's taken on the NRA -- and won.
2\. He stood up to Donald Trump and Republicans who seek to divide us.
3\. He supports Medicare for All.
4\. He supports a $15 minimum wage.
5\. He'll reverse $1 billion in Trump Corporate Tax breaks and put money into our public schools.

The list goes on and on.

I understand if you've been on the sidelines, waiting to invest. Conventional wisdom says a candidate like Mayor Gillum can't be the Democratic nominee. He's too progressive, he's the son of a construction worker and school bus driver, and he isn't famous.

But for Democrats, conventional wisdom has meant nothing but general election losses.

**[With your investment, time and money, Andrew Gillum will win this primary.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1c/446091091/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=4+-+With+your+investment+time+and+money+Andr")**

And together, we will make history by winning the general election.

Now is our time.

Scott Arceneaux
Senior Strategist
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1f/446091091/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180220_PollNonO_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

Tallahassee, FL 32303

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf1e/446091091/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonOpen_fnd_gq_act__SA"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b3/9e00690/424b9138/2403bf10/446091091/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180220_PollNonOpen_fnd_gq_act__SA&source=em18_180220_PollNonOpen_fnd_gq_act__SA")

name: The White House
subject: The plan to rebuild rural America
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54c85010390ac7e299ebb066ab7830d482138128d54604fa442a78f3ff9791b1895a5b2d2383ee044de0e12acc15f43ecc6

The plan to rebuild rural America

“Throughout American history, we have been recognized as a global leader in many areas, but we are in distinct danger of squandering advantages we hold over other countries when it comes to our infrastructure system,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes this week in the pages of the Des Moines Register.

Secretary Perdue is right—and he wisely points out that President Donald J. Trump’s infrastructure plan would steer the Nation back toward prosperity, “particularly in rural America.”

Here is how:

- President Trump’s plan allocates $50 billion, a quarter of all Federal funds in the plan, to empower rural America to address the infrastructure needs of its communities.
- The plan will give states the flexibility to address the unique needs of their rural residents without a flurry of bureaucratic commands from Washington.
- The Rural Infrastructure Program will build upon efforts the Administration has already undertaken to expand broadband access in rural America.

“We have to make sure American farmers and their families, wherever they may be, wherever they may go, have the infrastructure projects that they need to compete and grow,” President Trump said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54cd855c1c6e2c81e585636bf7e7f7e327e7d78536b4ce0f8852ef18f6655cbcd342d2a6179f03080aafae95087dfbfea9f
Learn how the Trump Administration is rebuilding rural infrastructure for the 21st century.

Bonus read:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54c1c49d5f8c8992b721556c4ba89372dd85ecbddb3426d772cd970b597a40b54e95fab34e8f202e5ec3ae568134e5e2291
Secretary Perdue says rural America will see ‘major benefits’

‘The end of immigration enforcement in America’

Last week, Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Chuck Grassley (R-IA) introduced legislation that would provide a pathway to citizenship for 1.8 million DACA-eligible illegal immigrants in exchange for border security resources and reforms to America’s broken Visa Lottery and chain migration immigrant systems.

“A simple, common-sense framework that can address everyone’s concerns,” Sen. Grassley called the bill last week.

Regrettably, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) led an effort to propose entirely new legislation that ignores the deep problems with the Visa Lottery and chain migration systems altogether. The Department of Homeland Security offered its stark assessment: The Schumer bill “would be the end of immigration enforcement in America.”

Here is an in-depth comparison of the two proposals:

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54c8cda142a60c29fafec1e8855374d2fe9a5e18f4c58399a8e7db83881d5f328346a55c78253fb8c558ca3922598b4e5ec
Read more about President Trump’s framework to fix immigration.

‘Small-business confidence hits record high’

“Small-business confidence is surging in 2018 as optimism rises among small-business owners about the newly enacted tax-reform package,” Kate Rogers writes for CNBC.

The Small Business Confidence Index, produced by CNBC and SurveyMonkey, confirms the findings from numerous recent polls: Americans are seeing positive results from the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act that President Trump signed shortly before Christmas. The index ticked up five points, from 57 to 62, reaching a record high with the largest quarter-to-quarter surge seen since the index launched.

Furthermore, a majority of Americans now support the tax law, according to a New York Times poll conducted by SurveyMonkey earlier this month. “Public opinion is moving in the direction of this bill,” Chief Research Officer for SurveyMonkey Jon Cohen said to the Times.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54c5e57173d36022fc0dd359dac245db6ec8b8c28a1c5e94917ff0d699d416e4133dab3f5154f0aa8794606a506943cdfa5
A majority of Americans now support the tax law, the Washington Examiner reports

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump presents the Medal of Valor | February 20, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will discuss the Economic Report of the President with the Council of Economic Advisers before having lunch with the Administrator of the Small Business Administration. This afternoon, the President will meet with trade union leaders and later, along with Vice President Mike Pence, host a listening session with high school students and teachers.

Today, the Vice President will lead the second meeting of the National Space Council, “Moon, Mars, and Worlds Beyond: Winning the Next Frontier,” and participate in a tour of Kennedy Space Center.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54cc4b5ebb421e6f4e8cbf165cdbbaae2c7f7613074a896c5fe3acbf18c70b6da76f9157dd2690977ded64b3e53b6e4ce56
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2ab6f543522fb54c7fc316488603d8ad0c7e15a6850f082b1cc43143a45c3b1f03b1c24ebc91a2f1c4a542f22a4cdc7416276c658baa9881
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c9d28706c86fcaa218efc8b2baedf6de036ff5dc617a1d1100e927a7294fb08b9b244f83fade46eea94756d6bbd6f17eb897d72edb1c7791

This afternoon, the President will meet with trade union leaders and later, along with Vice President Mike Pence, host a listening session with high school students and teachers. Today, the Vice President will lead the second meeting of the National Space Council, “Moon, Mars, and Worlds Beyond: Winning the Next Frontier,” and participate in a tour of Kennedy Space Center.

subject: Here's how we beat the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by and authorized by Friends of Chris Murphy
body:
Dear Activist,

Almost two years ago, I filibustered for 15 hours in the United States Senate urging my colleagues to show the courage to take on the gun lobby and pass legislation that would make our communities safer from gun violence.

You see, the American people are united on this issue. Even before last week's shooting, Democrats, Republicans, Independents and gun owners all believe it's time for action. The only place there is division is in Congress.

Should we pass universal background checks? Ban assault weapons? Limit high capacity magazines? Stop the sale of bump stocks? Prevent stalkers and domestic abusers from buying firearms? Make it easier to get mental health care than a gun? Should we strengthen the National Instant Background Check System? Should we overturn legislation preventing the Center for Disease Control from researching gun violence?

Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. And Yes.

Back to my story: I remember being about halfway through my filibuster that night and I looked up in the gallery of the Senate and saw one of my young sons.

First, I apologized for missing pizza night. But then I used that opportunity to try to teach him the lesson that nothing will ever change in this world for the better unless people make extraordinary efforts to undo the status quo.

So, today I want to ask you to do something extraordinary, Tim: I want you to promise me -- and everyone else taking this pledge -- that you will take action to defeat NRA-backed candidates in 2018.

Sign on to my pledge that you will do one of the following in 2018: vote against, donate to the opponent of, or volunteer to defeat at least one NRA-backed candidate. (http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/murphys-pledge?source=ads180221-demscom)

Before the election, I am going to check back in to ask which actions you took.

Let me tell you something about the corporate gun lobby: the American people are waking up to their con. Every single day we win more people to our side. It's not just the kids we're watching in the news since last week, it's everyone of all ages and of all backgrounds.

And that is because it is manifestly plain to anyone paying attention that their top priority is to protect the profits of gun manufacturers. The carnage on our streets? That is just the cost of doing business.

People have had enough.

And our mission right now it to make plain to candidates and elected officials in Congress, and frankly, in state legislatures and seats of government at all levels, that supporting the gun lobby's extremist positions is a recipe for defeat.

We have to make it clear that there is a price to pay for siding with the gun lobby. And that's what my pledge is about. Add your name:

Sign on to my pledge that you will do one of the following in 2018: vote against, donate to the opponent of, or volunteer to defeat at least one NRA-backed candidate. (http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/murphys-pledge?source=ads180221-demscom)

The corporate gun lobby has a decades long head start on us. They are big, and they are powerful. But every day their power wanes and ours grows. I believe we are on the precipice of relegating their extreme views to the dustbin of history, and that this is the election that becomes clear.

Thanks for doing something big with me today.

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy

(http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/murphys-pledge?source=ads180221-demscom)

You see, the American people are united on this issue. Even before last week's shooting, Democrats, Republicans, Independents and gun owners all believe it's time for action. The only place there is division is in Congress. Should we pass universal background checks? Ban assault weapons? Limit high capacity magazines? Stop the sale of bump stocks? Prevent stalkers and domestic abusers from buying firearms? Make it easier to get mental health care than a gun? Should we strengthen the National Instant Background Check System? Should we overturn legislation preventing the Center for Disease Control from researching gun violence? Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. And Yes. Back to my story: I remember being about halfway through my filibuster that night and I looked up in the gallery of the Senate and saw one of my young sons. First, I apologized for missing pizza night. But then I used that opportunity to try to teach him the lesson that nothing will ever change in this world for the better unless people make extraordinary efforts to undo the status quo. So, today I want to ask you to do something extraordinary, Tim: I want you to promise me -- and everyone else taking this pledge -- that you will take action to defeat NRA-backed candidates in 2018. Sign on to my pledge that you will do one of the following in 2018: vote against, donate to the opponent of, or volunteer to defeat at least one NRA-backed candidate. () Before the election, I am going to check back in to ask which actions you took. Let me tell you something about the corporate gun lobby: the American people are waking up to their con. Every single day we win more people to our side. It's not just the kids we're watching in the news since last week, it's everyone of all ages and of all backgrounds. And that is because it is manifestly plain to anyone paying attention that their top priority is to protect the profits of gun manufacturers. The carnage on our streets? That is just the cost of doing business. People have had enough. And our mission right now it to make plain to candidates and elected officials in Congress, and frankly, in state legislatures and seats of government at all levels, that supporting the gun lobby's extremist positions is a recipe for defeat. We have to make it clear that there is a price to pay for siding with the gun lobby. And that's what my pledge is about. Add your name: Sign on to my pledge that you will do one of the following in 2018: vote against, donate to the opponent of, or volunteer to defeat at least one NRA-backed candidate. () The corporate gun lobby has a decades long head start on us. They are big, and they are powerful. But every day their power wanes and ours grows. I believe we are on the precipice of relegating their extreme views to the dustbin of history, and that this is the election that becomes clear. Thanks for doing something big with me today. Every best wish, Chris Murphy () Paid for by and authorized by Friends of Chris Murphy If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link: Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: It's time to cure the epidemic of gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friends, No child should run for their lives down the halls of their school, with a backpack on their backs and books in their hands. No parent should pick up the phone -- or worse, turn on the news -- and hear a shooter opened fire at their child's high school. I live in Broward County. I have a child in high school in Broward County. A few of my friends have children in Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. As a resident, parent, and community member, my heart bleeds for the victims of the latest mass school shooting, their family and friends, and all those affected by this tragedy. And as an elected official, I outright reject the idea that there is nothing we can do. There is always something we can do. Somehow, we've allowed tragedies like this one to become the new normal rather than the unusual. That has to change. Gun violence is an epidemic. It's time we found a cure. In the coming days, I hope to work with my colleagues to make sure no community experiences the same pain Broward County feels right now. [_**I hope you will stand beside me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f8a/622b7b5b/197606d5/307bb2c3/3407399426/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180219") Debbie

\--Denis Hayes, organizer of Earth Day
Sean is humbled by this message -- and it speaks volumes about the stakes in this race. This is a critical time to send scientists and thought leaders to Congress. Hello,

Last week, Andrew debated the Speaker of the Florida House Richard Corcoran.

From denouncing Corcoran's divisive, anti-immigrant TV ad, to Corcoran's lack of action on enforcing common-sense gun safety laws, there was no debate about it -- Andrew proved he's the kind of leader families need to move Florida forward.

And we aren't the only ones who think so. _NowThis Politics_ , a top political and digital platform, highlighted Andrew's debate to bring awareness of how hostile Corcoran's ad is -- and it has been viewed over 1.2 million times on their Facebook page.

**[It's clear people around the nation agree: it's time Florida has a real leader like Andrew. If you haven't seen it, take a few moments to watch the video -- and then chip in to help Andrew rebuild Florida into a state that works for everyone.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31b5/9e00690/4257154b/2403b8a8/2162283237/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-nowthis-immigration?utm_campaign=em18_180221_NowThi_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180221_NowThi_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+clear+people+around+the+nation+")**

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Black History is American History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friend,
Black History Month is about celebrating the work and achievements of African Americans. We need more than a month to do this. Black history is part of American history, yet it is woefully missing in our history books.
Our Fellows at the Sanders Institute have been dedicated to educating about African American history--the men and women who have inspired them to continue to fight for justice in America.
**[The Black Power Mixtape 1967-1975:](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7acd7/bed43eb/4881f970/75fef5f9/2612516890/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/resources/documentaries/watch/the-black-power-mixtape-1967-1975")** This documentary, co-produced by Founding Fellow Danny Glover, was created using archival footage from the Black Power movement including interviews with prominent leaders, such as Stokely Carmichael, Bobby Seale, Angela Davis and Eldridge Cleaver. It serves as a reminder that the fight is not yet over.
**[Ben Jealous Reminds Us to'Agitate!' on Frederick Douglass' 200th Birthday:](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7acd7/bed43eb/4881f970/75fef5f8/2612516890/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/ben-jealous-reminds-us-to-agitate-on-frederick-douglass-200th-birthday")** In this article, Ben Jealous describes the life and activism of Frederick Douglass, a pioneer for civil rights. He traces Douglass' legacy and spirit through to modern events: "Douglass' influence was in the actions of lawyers who flocked to American airports to help immigrants caught in Donald Trump's Muslim ban. We saw it in the marchers who descended upon Charlottesville, Va., to say no to the Ku Klux Klan..."
**[Senator Turner at the We Will Not Be Moved Rally:](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7acd7/bed43eb/4881f970/75fef5fb/2612516890/VEsF/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/senator-nina-turner-at-the-we-will-not-be-moved-rally")** In her speech, Senator Turner calls on the crowd to not be discouraged by the situation in which they find themselves. Rather, they should look back at where they and their ancestors have come from, be proud and gain courage from that struggle and many of the successes that have led to a better, still imperfect, world.
Black History Month encourages us to understand, learn about, and celebrate the entirety of our history in America. Please join us in educating and informing all Americans of the many accomplishments of Black Americans, not just this month but every other month of the year too.
Thank you for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7acd7/bed43eb/4881f970/75fef5fa/2612516890/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180221")**

BURLINGTON, VT 05401

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c574c/24c69fd9/11418e358/18974631/3738751591/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact&source=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact")
---

Peter,

2018 is not the year to play it safe.

With both the House and Senate up for grabs, electing pro-choice Democratic women will be critical to putting Congress back in Democratic control.

Every week, we keep expanding the list of seats we think can flip this year -- including places where Democrats haven't won in more than a _decade._

Whether or not we actually have the resources to help pro-choice Democratic women run in these races depends on you.

**[Donate $3 to help elect even more pro-choice Democratic women running in districts we know can turn blue with the right candidate and a strong campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c574c/24c69fd9/11418e358/18974632/3738751591/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180221_email_NotPlayingItSafe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+even+more+prochoi&utm_campaign=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact&source=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact")**

If Democrats are going to take back Congress this year, it _has_ to be by electing more pro-choice Democratic women.

We have endorsed 24 House women running in red-to-blue races -- that's the same number of seats Democrats need to flip to take back the House!

And we have endorsed Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ) who are the best chances Democrats have to regain the majority in the Senate.

It's so exciting to see our list of endorsements growing every day and our chances to turn Congress blue improving. It's all possible because of your support -- and we need to keep it up.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women turn red seats blue:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Grow-Endorsements-List](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c574c/24c69fd9/11418e358/18974633/3738751591/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180221_email_NotPlayingItSafe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGrowEndorsements&utm_campaign=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact&source=WQEFEN41N_digital_email_20180221_NotPlayItSafe_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Team Jealous
subject: RE: You're Invited: Education Meet and Greet with Ben
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Join us Saturday evening for a meet and greet with Ben!
#
Friends,
We would love for you to join us for this event Saturday. **[RSVP here to let us know you're coming.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a728/7ab0e2c4/7f449d51/349a19b7/2160376741/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-meet-and-greet-pg?source=EMD02218A") **
Hope to see you there,
Team Jealous
* * *
Not too long ago, Maryland schools ranked first in the nation, but sadly we've fallen to sixth, and Governor Hogan has failed to offer a concrete plan to get us back to number one. In fact, despite claims that he's funding schools at "record levels," students spent the winter freezing in their classrooms.
Our young people deserve more, and as leaders, we have to set a better example. What does it say to our kids about their value when no one takes responsibility or demands accountability when the system fails them?
As a civil rights leader, community organizer, and businessman, Ben has spent his life bringing people together to get big things done. Those experiences have taught him that change begins with leadership that can inspire people to come together. Saturday night, we'll be gathering together to discuss how we move our state forward. **[RSVP here to let us know you're coming.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a728/7ab0e2c4/7f449d51/349a19b7/2160376741/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-meet-and-greet-pg?source=EMD02218A") **
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a728/7ab0e2c4/7f449d51/349a19b7/2160376741/VEsF/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-meet-and-greet-pg?source=EMD02218A")

* * *

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: [action needed] net neutrality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Urgent update:
This is a crucial window, and we need to act fast: The Senate has just a few weeks to pass legislation to save net neutrality, which the Trump administration repealed late last year.
A free and open internet is crucial to our democracy -- no one should have to pay a premium for full access to the web, but that's exactly what could happen if the Senate doesn't act fast.
If you use the internet to read the news, communicate with your friends or promote your business, this affects you. **[That's why we need to show the Senate that they need to act by getting 5,200 signatures before midnight _tonight._](https://secure.bobcasey.
